meaning: n.(supplementaries) 增补者,增补物adj.附助的
examples: Its designers were not high-end with supplementary lines.
Only rarely are supplementary worksheets distributed in a maths class.
The OWF is an ideal supplementary resource for learners to engage in word-building activities during topic-based lessons.
Deputy Andrew Le Lievre said he wanted bigger rises for pensions and long-term supplementary benefits.
The government will almost certainly try to boost the economy with a supplementary budget in August.
